description: Invoice payment application table for Oracle Accounts Payable. Each record represents a payment event applied to a supplier invoice and links the invoice, payment instrument, accounting dates, gains or losses, and settlement amounts used in payment accounting and audit history.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_EVENT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Subledger Accounting event that generated accounting for the transaction.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_DATE
columns.description: Accounting date used to recognize the transaction in Subledger Accounting and General Ledger.

columns.name: ACCRUAL_POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether accrual posted applies to the record.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount recorded for the transaction in the transaction currency.

columns.name: CASH_POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether cash posted applies to the record.

columns.name: CHECK_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the payment document or electronic payment record associated with the settlement.

columns.name: INVOICE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the supplier invoice header associated with the line, distribution, schedule, or payment.

columns.name: INVOICE_PAYMENT_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the invoice payment application record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: PAYMENT_NUM
columns.description: Sequence number identifying the payment event or installment against the document.

columns.name: PERIOD_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with period.

columns.name: POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether posted applies to the record.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Liability account combination charged for the supplier invoice or payment accounting entry.

columns.name: ASSET_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related asset code combination record.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank account.

columns.name: BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control bank account processing.

columns.name: BANK_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence bank.

columns.name: DISCOUNT_LOST
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice payment used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DISCOUNT_TAKEN
columns.description: Business attribute of the invoice payment used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Date used to derive the foreign currency conversion rate.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Exchange rate used to convert the foreign currency transaction to functional currency.

columns.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Conversion rate type used to derive the exchange rate for the transaction.

columns.name: GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related gain code combination record.

columns.name: INVOICE_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing invoice base for the transaction.

columns.name: LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related loss code combination record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing payment base for the transaction.

columns.name: CASH_JE_BATCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related cash je batch record.

columns.name: FUTURE_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related future pay code combination record.

columns.name: FUTURE_PAY_POSTED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether future pay posted applies to the record.

columns.name: JE_BATCH_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related je batch record.

columns.name: ELECTRONIC_TRANSFER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related electronic transfer record.

columns.name: ASSETS_ADDITION_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether assets addition applies to the record.

columns.name: INVOICE_PAYMENT_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control invoice payment processing.

columns.name: OTHER_INVOICE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related other invoice record.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier that owns the transaction in a multi-org Oracle EBS environment.

columns.name: EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the external supplier or customer bank account used for settlement.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with mrc exchange.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE
columns.description: Rate used to calculate or value mrc exchange for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE
columns.description: Type classification used to control mrc exchange rate processing.

columns.name: MRC_GAIN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related mrc gain code combination record.

columns.name: MRC_INVOICE_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing mrc invoice base for the transaction.

columns.name: MRC_LOSS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related mrc loss code combination record.

columns.name: MRC_PAYMENT_BASE_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing mrc payment base for the transaction.

columns.name: REVERSAL_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether reversal applies to the record.

columns.name: REVERSAL_INV_PMT_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related reversal inv pmt record.

columns.name: IBAN_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence iban nu.

columns.name: INVOICING_PARTY_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related invoicing party record.

columns.name: INVOICING_PARTY_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related invoicing party site record.

columns.name: INVOICING_VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related invoicing vendor site record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with remit to supplier.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier record.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE
columns.description: Supplier site to which payment remittance is directed.

columns.name: REMIT_TO_SUPPLIER_SITE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related remit to supplier site record.

business_questions: Show payment history for a supplier invoice.
Trace a payment document back to the invoices it settled.
List payment applications posted during a period.
Show payment gains, losses, discounts, and accounting dates.
Display partial payments made against an invoice.
Show payment records by supplier, bank account, or operating unit.
Identify invoices paid by a specific check or payment instruction.
